text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not wanting to lose to Vodka, Daiwa Scarlet
shows off how much she has improved at a
scrimmage before the Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, the day of the Shuka Sho arrives. It's time
for the two rivals to show each other how much
they've grown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Deeming Scarlet a worthy opponent, Vodka gears
up for a challenge. Both have trained extensively,
and recognize each other's progress. Now, we'll
see just who's on top!
